upgrades.name: Bigger Radius
upgrades.description: Increases influence radius of the Village.

upgrades.name: Jungle Drums
upgrades.description: Increases attack speed of all Monkeys in the radius.

upgrades.name: Primary Training
upgrades.description: All Primary Monkeys in radius get more range, pierce and projectile speed.

upgrades.name: Primary Mentoring
upgrades.description: Increased range. All Primary Monkeys in radius get tier 1 upgrades for free, increased range and reduced ability cooldowns.

upgrades.name: Primary Expertise
upgrades.description: Adds Mega Ballista attack, plus all Primary Monkeys in radius get more popping power, ability cooldowns reduced further and tier 1 and 2 upgrades for free.

upgrades.name: Grow Blocker
upgrades.description: Prevents Regrow Bloons from working while in the radius of the Village.

upgrades.name: Radar Scanner
upgrades.description: Allows all Monkeys in the radius to attack Camo Bloons.

upgrades.name: Monkey Intelligence Bureau
upgrades.description: The Bureau grants special Bloon popping knowledge, allowing nearby Monkeys to pop all Bloon types.

upgrades.name: Call to Arms
upgrades.description: Call to Arms Ability: Gives all Monkeys +50% attack speed and pops for a short time.

upgrades.name: Homeland Defense
upgrades.description: Ability now increases attack speed and pops by 100% for all Monkeys for 20 seconds.

upgrades.name: Monkey Business
upgrades.description: Provides 10% discount to all Monkeys and upgrades tier 3 or less purchased in the radius of the Village.

upgrades.name: Monkey Commerce
upgrades.description: An additional 5% discount that can stack with up to 2 other Villages with this upgrade.

upgrades.name: Monkey Town
upgrades.description: All Monkeys within the radius of the Monkey Town get extra cash per Bloon pop.

upgrades.name: Monkey City
upgrades.description: Increases influence radius, cash generation in radius, and gives you a free Dart Monkey every round.

upgrades.name: Monkeyopolis
upgrades.description: Absorbs all nearby Banana Farms and their income, freeing up space for new Monkeys.
